Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (northern residents deduction)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (northern residents deduction)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to increase the daily deduction that can be claimed for residing in a certain northern zone, to tie that amount to the Consumer Price Index and to remove the distinction between the intermediate zone and the northern zone by merging those two zones into one northern zone.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Subsection.Text: Subsections 110.7(1) and (2) of the Income Tax Act are replaced by the following:

When, throughout a period (in this section referred to as the âqualifying periodâ) of not less than six consecutive months beginning or ending in a taxation year, a taxpayer who is an individual has resided in one or more particular areas each of which is a northern zone referred to in Schedule 1 for the year and files for the year a claim in the prescribed form, there may be deducted in computing the taxpayerâs taxable income for the year

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the total of all amounts of trip costs to the taxpayer in respect of trips that begin during the particular period in the taxation year; and

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: 20% of the taxpayerâs income for the year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the total of all amounts each of which is the total of

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: $13.00 multiplied by the number of days in the year included in the qualifying period in which the taxpayer resided in a particular area, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: $13.00 multiplied by the number of days in the year included in that portion of the qualifying period throughout which the taxpayer maintained and resided in a self-contained domestic establishment in a particular area (except any day included in computing a deduction claimed under this paragraph by another person who resided on that day in the establishment).

Subsection.Text: The portion of subsection 110.7(3.1) of the Act before paragraph (a) is replaced by the following:
For the purpose of paragraph (1)(a), an amount may only be included in computing the total of all amounts of trip costs for a taxation year if
Subsection 110.7(3.2) of the Act is replaced by the following:

If all amounts determined under paragraph 7304(2)(a) of the Income Tax Regulations are nil in respect of trips (beginning in the taxation year) made by an individual, the total of all amounts of trip costs referred to in paragraph (1)(a) in the taxation year for all taxpayers in respect of the individual must not exceed the standard amount for the individual for the taxation year.
Paragraph 110.7(4)(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: can reasonably be considered to be attributable to that portion of the qualifying period that is in the year and during which the taxpayer maintained a self-contained domestic establishment as the taxpayerâs principal place of residence in an area other than a northern zone referred to in Schedule 1 for the year.

Subsection.Text: Section 110.7 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (6):
The Governor in Council may, by order, amend Schedule 1 by adding, replacing or deleting the name or the coordinates of an area.

Section.Text: Subsection 117.1(2) of the Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph (c):

Paragraph.Label: (c.1)
Paragraph.Text: each of the amounts expressed in dollars in subparagraph 110.7(1)(b)(ii);

Section.Text: Subparagraph (g)(i) of the definition financial institution in subsection 181(1) of the Act is replaced by the following:
The schedule to the Act is numbered as Schedule 2.
The Act is amended by adding, before Schedule 2, the Schedule 1 set out in the schedule to this Act.
This Act applies to the 2025 and subsequent taxation years.

Schedule.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (northern residents deduction)

Provision.Text: The Yukon Territory
The Northwest Territories
Nunavut
That part of British Columbia that lies

Provision.Label: (a)
Provision.Text: north of 55Â°35â²N latitude;

Provision.Label: (b)
Provision.Text: north of 55Â°00â²N latitude and east of 122Â°00â²W longitude; or

Provision.Label: (c)
Provision.Text: north of 55Â°13â²N latitude and east of 123Â°16â²W longitude.
That part of Alberta that lies north of 55Â°00â²N latitude.
That part of Saskatchewan that lies

Provision.Label: (a)
Provision.Text: north of 55Â°00â²N latitude;

Provision.Label: (b)
Provision.Text: north of 54Â°15â²N latitude and east of 107Â°00â²W longitude; or

Provision.Label: (c)
Provision.Text: north of 53Â°20â²N latitude and east of 103Â°00â²W longitude.
That part of Manitoba that lies

Provision.Label: (a)
Provision.Text: north of 53Â°20â²N latitude;

Provision.Label: (b)
Provision.Text: north of 52Â°30â²N latitude and east of 95Â°25â²W longitude;

Provision.Label: (c)
Provision.Text: north of 52Â°10â²N latitude and east of 97Â°40â²W longitude; or

Provision.Label: (d)
Provision.Text: north of 51Â°30â²N latitude and east of 96Â°00â²W longitude.
That part of Ontario that lies north of 50Â°35â²N latitude.
That part of Quebec that lies

Provision.Label: (a)
Provision.Text: north of 50Â°35â²N latitude and west of 79Â°00â²W longitude;

Provision.Label: (b)
Provision.Text: north of 49Â°00â²N latitude, east of 79Â°00â²W longitude and west of 74Â°00â²W longitude;

Provision.Label: (c)
Provision.Text: north of 50Â°00â²N latitude, east of 74Â°00â²W longitude and west of 70Â°00â²W longitude;

Provision.Label: (d)
Provision.Text: north of 50Â°45â²N latitude, east of 70Â°00â²W longitude and west of 65Â°30â²W longitude; or

Provision.Label: (e)
Provision.Text: north of the Gulf of St. Lawrence, east of 65Â°30â²W longitude.
Labrador, including Belle Isle
The Queen Charlotte Islands
Anticosti Island
The Magdalen Islands
Sable Island
